calendar.matters:
ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-01-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-17-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for Petitioner
Paul Smoot for Richard Ragan (Personal Representative of Anthony Vidak Estate)

The Court inquired about Mr. Ragan's standing in this case, and noted that it has received a waiver of notice but no waiver of accounting from Mr. Ragan. Mr. Weinkauf stated that he thought a waiver of accounting was filed, can get one filed, and that he missed the calendar call on April 3, 2018. Mr. Smoot stated the he spoke with Mr. Weinkauf about handling the accounting aspect, that Anthony Vidak's estate is being probated, he waives accounting on behalf of his client, the fees and costs have been submitted/negotiated with the city administrator, and checks have been cashed. Mr. Weinkauf stated the funds are still in the accounts. The Court expressed his expectation of Mr. Weinkauf's client to be responsible for carrying out fiduciary duties, and may reduce Administrator's fees in light of the way this was handled. The Order to Appear is Off Calendar. The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account, etc. is Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Continued To May-01-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney, Steven Weinkauf, to appear on May 1, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why payment of filing fees have not been paid now that the case is solvent, and why he has failed to addressed the issue of the Administrator allowing a third party to handle significant aspects of administration. The Petition for Final Distribution is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-22-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-06-2017 Continued To Mar-22-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for petitioner San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Weinkauf stated that he had been working to complete the closing of the estate until just prior to the previous hearing date, and his office had telephoned a late request that the hearing be continued. He apologized that he had neither confirmed that the continuance had been granted nor made an appearance at the scheduled hearing. He reported that the petition for final distribution has been filed and is now set for hearing on March 22, 2017. The status hearing was continued to March 22, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-08-2017 Continued To Mar-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Smoot for The Estate of Anthony Vidak.

Mr. Smoot stated he has been going back and forth with the Public Administrator with petitions, that the signed off on a final petition last Thursday and provided background history. An Order to Show Cause will be issued to Attorney Steven Weinkauf to appear on March 6, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why sanctions should not be imposed against him for failure to appear and for failure to file a petition to close the estate. Status on close of estate and the order to appear are also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-11-2017 Continued To Feb-08-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Smoot for the Representative/Petitioner in the Estate of Anthony Vidak.

Mr. Smoot stated that there is a petition for waiver of account, that he is working with Mr. Weinkauf and that he returned the documents to Mr. Weinkauf on January 3, 2017. An Order to Appear will be issued to Steven Weinkauf Attorney for the Public Administrator to appear on February 8, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why a petition to close the Estate has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Wu. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-07-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Smoot (via court call) for (petioner) Richard Ragan. Steve Weinkauf for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

The Court stated that we are here on Mr. Ragan's petition for letters of administration, that the Public Administrator has asserted priority and asked if it would be contested. Mr. Smoot stated that they do not object, that there was an issue about locating heirs, that they have located heirs in Croatia, that they have filed a declaration and that they have no objection to the Public Administrator being appointed. The court stated that there is no one else seeking appointment and that it does not see a reason not to appoint the Public Administrator and requested that Mr. Weinkauf submit an order as such. The Court granted the petition for letters of administration appointing the San Francisco Public Administrator (subject to receipt/review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
